column1: # Snapshot: Stigma THC — PDF import run ~2026-03-29 (before server-side URL polling fix).
# UI showed "Uploaded: 0, failed: 420" while files appeared in Shopify Admin → Content → Files.
# Root cause: fileCreate returned fileStatus UPLOADED with empty url until Shopify finished processing.
# Fix: control-plane polls GenericFile until url is available (see wp-shopify-migration-pdf-shopify.ts).
# Full export from the wizard was ~420 rows; below is a sample (wordpress_id, title, result).
